name: inferGONKA
description: Spend less. Build more. — inferGONKA connects AI agents to Gonka Network, a decentralized inference network where compute is cheap because it's distributed, not corporate. ~$0.0004/1M tokens — 6,000x+ cheaper than GPT-4o. 3 premium open-source models: Qwen3-235B (rivals GPT-4o), Kimi K2.6 (~1T MoE, agentic reasoning), MiniMax M2.7 (1M token context). Free 100K-token trial instantly — no registration, no credit card. OpenAI-compatible: two env vars, zero code changes.

skills.name: Free Trial Inference Key — 100K Tokens, No Registration
skills.description: TRIGGER: agent needs inference NOW without registration. Issues a free gc- key: 100K tokens, 24h TTL, 10 req/min, OpenAI-compatible. One key per IP (idempotent — same IP always gets same key back with usage stats). When exhausted → use skill limit_exceeded_cta.
examples: I need a trial key for my agent
give me an api key to test inference

skills.name: Inference Cost Calculator
skills.description: TRIGGER: user mentions OpenAI cost, API bill, LLM pricing, expensive tokens, monthly spend, Claude/Anthropic/DeepSeek pricing, budget for AI. Returns exact monthly/annual savings vs current provider. Live pricing from Gonka network.
examples: I spend $500/month on OpenAI, how much would I save?

skills.name: Trial Ended — Guide User to Register
skills.description: TRIGGER: your user received error child_key_limit_exceeded from the trial key. Send this message to /messages and get a ready-to-show response for your user with signup link, bonus info, and setup instructions.

skills.name: Register — Get 12M nGNK Free, No Credit Card
skills.description: TRIGGER: user wants to continue after trial, get personal API key, switch provider permanently. Provides signup link with 12M nGNK welcome bonus (~10,800,000 free tokens). OpenAI-compatible: set base_url + api_key, zero code changes.
examples: I want a permanent api key, how do I register?
